name: Spiked Shield
description:
Crude metal spikes adorn this magic Shield. It has the following properties that you can use while holding it.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Shield Bash", "entries": ["When you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action, you can make one of the attack rolls using the Shield against a target within 5 feet of yourself. Apply your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} and Strength modifier to the attack roll. On a hit, the Shield deals Piercing damage equal to {@dice 2d6} plus your Strength m
